div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: ⑦ CTRL_FSM — Moore FSM de 2 estados (pipeline 1 ciclo de latência)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: ⑥ WRITE_CTRL — registra na borda ↑clk quando write_en=1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: ⑤ AGE_UPDATE — lógica combinacional, todos os ways em paralelo

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: ③ TAG_COMPARATOR — N_WAYS comparadores em paralelo

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: ② ARRAYS DE ARMAZENAMENTO — leitura assíncrona (LUTRAM) ou 1 ciclo (BRAM)

color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
set_idx = addr [ OFF_W + IDX_W - 1 : OFF_W ]
tag_in = addr [ ADDR_W - 1 : OFF_W + IDX_W ]

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
TAG_SRAM
─────────────────
N_SETS × N_WAYS × TAG_W
SRAM dual-port
rd: set_idx → tag_rd[]
wr: we_tag, set, way, data

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
VALID_REG
─────────────────
N_SETS × N_WAYS × 1 bit
Banco de flip-flops
reset: todos 0

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
AGE_REG
─────────────────
N_SETS × N_WAYS × AGE_W
Banco de flip-flops
reset: age[w] = w

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Para cada way w ∈ [0 .. N_WAYS-1]:
hit_vec[w] = valid_rd[w] AND (tag_rd[w] == tag_in)
─────────────────────────────────────────────
hit_any = OR_REDUCE(hit_vec)
hit_way = PriorityEncode(hit_vec) → WAY_W bits

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
INVALID_FINDER
─────────────────
inv_vec[w] = NOT valid_rd[w]
has_inv = OR_REDUCE(inv_vec)
inv_way = PriorityEncode(inv_vec)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LRU_VICTIM_SEL
─────────────────────────────
Árvore de torneio log₂(N_WAYS) estágios
Compara age_rd[w] par a par
victim_lru = argmax_w(age_rd[w])

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
HIT PATH — on_hit():
prev_age = age_rd[hit_way]
age_next[hit_way] = 0
age_next[w] = age_rd[w] + 1
se valid_rd[w] AND age_rd[w] < prev_age
senão age_rd[w] (inalterado)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MISS PATH — insert_as_mru():
age_next[victim] = 0
age_next[w] = age_rd[w] + 1
se valid_rd[w] AND age_rd[w] < (N_WAYS-1)
senão age_rd[w] (inalterado)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EM HIT:
AGE_REG[set_idx][*] ← age_next[*]
EM MISS:
TAG_SRAM[set_idx][victim] ← tag_in
VALID_REG[set_idx][victim] ← 1
AGE_REG[set_idx][*] ← age_next[*]

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
IDLE ──(valid_req=1)──▶ TAG_CMP ──(1 ciclo)──▶ UPDATE ──▶ IDLE
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
IDLE : rd_en=0, we=0, stall=0
TAG_CMP: rd_en=1, we=0, stall=1 ← lê arrays
UPDATE : rd_en=0, we=1, stall=0 ← write_ctrl escreve
